note: Phased migration strategy — no executable SQL or code. Design-level approach only.
principles: Never break recipe_ingredients XOR integrity during migration
Backfill from invoice line replay, not heuristic name matching alone
Run Phase 0 guard before any schema migration to stop false OI signals
Dual-write period: old ingredient_id paths work while new variant paths populate
Ambiguous rows marked non_chainable rather than guessed

phases.name: Cross-format history guard (no schema)
actions: Persist purchase_quantity_snapshot + base_unit_snapshot on new price_history rows (app layer if column not yet added)
Block previous_price chain when contract_hash(pq, base_unit) differs
Classify OI outputs as format_change vs price_spike
Suppress Mozzarella/Pepino-class deltas from opportunity ranking
phases.vlValidation: Re-run operational-intelligence-integrity-audit; expect 0 untrusted opportunities from identity collapse

phases.name: Concept + Pack Variant (Option B core)
phases.goal: Separate purchase contracts from culinary concept
schemaConcepts: Rename mental model: ingredients → ingredient_concepts (may keep table name initially)
dataMigration: For each ingredient: create one default pack_variant from current_price/purchase_quantity/base_unit
Replay VL invoice_items → infer additional variants where pq or base_unit differs (Mozzarella, Pepino)
Backfill price_history.pack_variant_id via (invoice_id, ingredient_id) join + line normalization replay
appMigration: Matching: resolve to variant_id; suggest new variant when contract differs
phases.dualWrite: ingredients.current_price mirrors default variant for legacy readers
phases.rollback: Revert to ingredient-level price if variant table empty

phases.name: Supplier Product layer (Option D)
schemaConcepts: Extend ingredient_aliases with supplier_product_id and pack_variant_id
dataMigration: Cluster existing variants by supplier_name from price_history
Split Mozzarella into Bocconcino product + Aviludo product each with own variants
Re-link aliases to supplier_product or pack_variant with confidence
Ginger Beer: create supplier_product per Emporio with volume-specific variants
appMigration: buildSupplierIntelligence operates at supplier_product and variant levels
Invoice match confirmation UI shows three-level hierarchy

phases.name: Equivalence + Form ontology (Option E extensions)
phases.goal: Recipe substitution and forecasting without false price chains
schemaConcepts: form_dimension on concept or supplier_product (fresh, preserved, processed, beverage)
forecasting_series keyed on pack_variant_id (placeholder for future ML)
dataMigration: Pepino: either split concepts (fresco vs conserva) OR equivalence_group with substitution_policy=never_for_pricing
Mozzarella piece/block: equivalence_group for recipe substitution only if caterer confirms interchangeable
Beverage variants: require volume_ml_per_unit on all pack_variants
appMigration: Recipe picker shows concept; advanced picker selects variant
OI opportunities only within equivalence_group with same contract_hash
Supplier switch recommends only equivalent variants

phases.name: Deprecation + cleanup
actions: Make pack_variant_id NOT NULL on price_history
Stop writing ingredients.current_price (read through default variant)
VL full re-read to refresh all variant prices from v31

mozzarella_2a99cecd.historyAction: Split existing 3 rows to correct variants; recompute deltas within variant only

pepino_635a1189.concept: Split recommended: Pepino fresco vs Pepino conserva (two concepts)
pepino_635a1189.alternative: Single concept with form guard blocking fresh↔preserved match

gingerBeer.extractionDependency: Volume parse fix must land with variant creation

riskMitigation.mitigation: Invoice line replay + user confirm for ambiguous
default_pack_variant preserves current costing until user opts in
VL re-read after Phase 1; delete orphan variant-less history
Progressive disclosure — concept in recipes, variant in invoice match

parallelWork: VL DB re-read (stale Jun 11) — independent, run after Phase 0
Ginger Beer volume parse guard — required before beverage variants trusted
Home dashboard wire to real data — independent of identity schema
